name: A Story of Lala's Promotion
overview: Wang Luodan stars as our white-collar heroine Du Lala, a charming administrative assistant who works her way up in a big multinational corporation in Shanghai. Through much trials and tribulations, she begins to understand what it takes to survive on the office battlefield, and the delicate art of balancing career and romance.

trailers.title: 【职场爽剧】#新闻女王 同款🔥EP1 杜拉拉升职记A Story of Lala’s Promotion | 王珞丹/李光洁 | SMG五岸梦想剧场
